calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-03-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Nov-04-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

David F. Perry, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, National Association.
Andrea Banduhn, Vice President for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Centennial Distributors, Inc., a corporation, dba Centennial Electrical Distributors and Plumbing, Inc., or Carlos Quiroz.
Defaults were entered against defendants on July 20, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed November 2, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Wells Farco Bank, National Association, and against the Defaulted Defendants Centennial Distributors, Inc., a corporation, dba Centennial Electrical Distributors and Plumbing, Inc., and Carlos Quiroz as follows:

Damages/Principal - $46,742.49.
Prejudgment Interest - $12,947.17.
Attorney Fees - $2,000.00.
Costs - $877.12.

Total - $62,566.78.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
